fah_sai_lpk_model.customer_ops_event.comment: Model-facing customer operations event surface combining returns, warranty claims, CS interactions, shipping, loyalty ledger, and promo redemptions.

source_table.comment: Official source table for citation and routing; values include FACT_RETURN, FACT_WARRANTY_CLAIM, FACT_CS_INTERACTION, FACT_SHIPPING, FACT_LOYALTY_LEDGER, and FACT_PROMO_REDEMPTION.

source_pk.comment: Official source primary key for citation and audit trace.

business_event_date.comment: Canonical default date axis for customer operations period filters. Use posting_date only when explicitly requested.

posting_date.comment: Accounting posting date. Use only when the question explicitly asks for posted/booked/accounting timing.

effective_date.comment: Fact-row effective metadata; not the default period filter.

as_of_date.comment: Bundle/snapshot as-of metadata; not the event period filter.

fah_sai_lpk_model.document_evidence.comment: Model-facing public-safe document evidence surface over compact BGE-M3 parent-child RAG chunks and entity links. Use child chunk text for matching and parent_text for hydrated context.

source_table.comment: Official source table for citation and routing.

source_pk.comment: Official source primary key for citation and audit trace.

retrieval_profile.comment: Retrieval profile for embedded evidence. Default production profile is bge_m3_v1.

child_chunk_id.comment: Embedding-grain child chunk id for BGE-M3 retrieval and citations.

parent_chunk_id.comment: Parent context row used to hydrate this embedded child chunk.

parent_text.comment: Hydrated parent context for the matched child chunk. Use for answer context, not as a separate table.

has_embedding.comment: True when this public-safe BGE-M3 child chunk has a 1024-dimensional embedding available through match_public_chunks_bge_m3.

fah_sai_lpk_model.finance_event.comment: Model-facing finance event surface combining FACT_BANK_TRANSACTION, FACT_REFUND_PAID, FACT_VENDOR_PAYMENT, and FACT_PAYROLL. Preserve source_table/source_pk for official citations.

source_table.comment: Official source table for citation and routing; values include FACT_BANK_TRANSACTION, FACT_REFUND_PAID, FACT_VENDOR_PAYMENT, and FACT_PAYROLL.

source_pk.comment: Official source primary key for citation and audit trace.

business_event_date.comment: Canonical default date axis for finance event period filters. Use posting_date only when the question explicitly asks for posted/booked/accounting timing.

posting_date.comment: Accounting posting date. Use only when the question explicitly asks for posted/booked/accounting timing.

effective_date.comment: Fact-row effective metadata; not the default period filter.

as_of_date.comment: Bundle/snapshot as-of metadata; not the event period filter.

fah_sai_lpk_model.inventory_event.comment: Model-facing inventory event surface combining inventory movements and monthly snapshots. XFER-* related_txn_id values are internal transfer ids, not missing sales FKs.

source_table.comment: Official source table for citation and routing.

source_pk.comment: Official source primary key for citation and audit trace.

business_event_date.comment: Canonical default date axis for inventory event period filters. Use month_end_date for monthly snapshot questions that explicitly ask for month-end stock.

posting_date.comment: Accounting posting date. Use only when the question explicitly asks for posted/booked/accounting timing.

effective_date.comment: Fact-row effective metadata; not the default period filter.

as_of_date.comment: Bundle/snapshot as-of metadata; not the event period filter.

related_txn_id.comment: Polymorphic id; TXN-* can point to sales and XFER-* is an internal transfer id.

fah_sai_lpk_model.policy_catalog.comment: Model-facing policy/catalog surface for policy versions, signing authority ladder rows, promo campaigns/mechanics, and vendor contract versions.

source_table.comment: Official source table for citation and routing.

source_pk.comment: Official source primary key for citation and audit trace.

effective_date.comment: Policy/catalog start date. For active-version lookup use effective_date <= target date and (end_date IS NULL OR target date < end_date) unless the question states an inclusive end-date rule.

fah_sai_lpk_model.product_catalog.comment: Model-facing product catalog surface. Grain: one row per DIM_PRODUCT.sku_id with department, vendor, care-plus, and recall context.

source_table.comment: Official source table for citation and routing.

source_pk.comment: Official source primary key for citation and audit trace.

fah_sai_lpk_model.sales_line_360.comment: Model-facing sales line surface. Grain: one row per FACT_SALES_LINE_ITEM.line_item_id. Use for SKU/product/category/vendor units, gross revenue from line_total_thb, and product-mix questions. Do not sum order totals from this line-grain view.

source_table.comment: Official source table for citation and routing.

source_pk.comment: Official source primary key for citation and audit trace.

line_item_id.comment: Sales line item grain. One row per line_item_id.

business_event_date.comment: Canonical default date axis for sales-line period filters. If a question says year/month/quarter without naming a date column, filter on business_event_date.

posting_date.comment: Accounting posting date. Use only when the question explicitly asks for posted/booked/accounting timing.

effective_date.comment: Fact-row effective metadata; not the default period filter.

as_of_date.comment: Bundle/snapshot as-of metadata; not the event period filter.

order_net_total_thb.comment: Repeated order-level value. Do not sum this from line-grain rows.

line_total_thb.comment: Use for SKU/product gross revenue from line-level sales.

fah_sai_lpk_model.sales_order_360.comment: Model-facing sales order surface. Grain: one row per FACT_SALES.txn_id. Use for order counts, branch/channel/customer/payment status, basket/net totals, B2B AR, and sales-header questions.

source_table.comment: Official source table for citation; this view cites FACT_SALES rows.

source_pk.comment: Official source primary key for citation and audit trace.

txn_id.comment: Sales order grain. One row per txn_id.

business_event_date.comment: Canonical default date axis for sales/order period filters. If a question says year/month/quarter without naming a date column, filter on business_event_date.

posting_date.comment: Accounting posting date. Use only when the question explicitly asks for posted/booked/accounting timing.

effective_date.comment: Fact-row effective metadata; not the default period filter.

as_of_date.comment: Bundle/snapshot as-of metadata; not the event period filter.
